00255|   /**
00256|    * Send the transaction. Gas is already baked into preparedWrite.
00257|    * Uses sendTransactionAsync so errors are thrown directly (not via state),
00258|    * enabling proper catch/retry without relying on wagmi's sendError state.
00259|    */
00260|   const executePreparedWrite = useCallback(async (preparedWrite: PreparedWrite): Promise<void> => {
00261|     try {
00262|       await sendTransactionAsync({
00263|         to: preparedWrite.to,
00264|         data: preparedWrite.data,
00265|         value: preparedWrite.value,
00266|         gas: preparedWrite.gas,
00267|       })
00268|     } catch (error) {
00269|       const errorObj = error instanceof Error ? error : new Error(String(error))
00270|       const blockchainError = new BlockchainError('Transaction execution failed', 'TX_EXECUTION_ERROR', errorObj)
00271|       setState({ status: 'error', error: blockchainError, txHash: null, isLoading: false })
00272|       throw blockchainError
00273|     }
00274|   }, [sendTransactionAsync])
